title: Guns and Glory II
description: Welcome to Guns and Glory 2! This is my first ever modpack so it might not be the best. This modpack is pretty straightforward, its just guns, shaders, and a few other things like the enchanting infuser and Essential. Its pretty easy to figure it out.
body:
**Hello and welcome to Guns and Glory 2, the first modpack I've made!**
## Contents:
- Vein Miner
- Tree falling
- Essentials (multiplayer access)
- Enchanting Infuser
- Guns+enchantments for them
- Shaders
- EMI (shows all crafting recipes)
- ...More to come!
## How to play
this is a pretty simple mod and is easy to figure out. To craft gun workbenches or mods for them, just search tacz in the search bar in the crafting menu. Same goes with the enchanting infuser. Also, to access shaders you can either go to the setttings menu and go to video settings or hit k. Everything else is straightforward, have fun!
## Future updates
- More shaders to choose from
- Better animations (if i can find them)
- Different mobs that might be harder to fight (maybe)
- any other cool mods i can find
